campaigns.name: AI Workflow Authority
campaigns.objective: Establish Danox as the go-to expert for practical AI automation systems by generating 500+ qualified LinkedIn impressions per week and 15+ consultation requests monthly.
campaigns.targetAudience: Founders and operators at early-to-mid-stage tech-enabled companies experiencing AI tool overload, unclear ROI, and integration complexity with legacy systems.
campaigns.positioning: Practical, ROI-first AI workflow systems that solve specific operational problems without creating complexity or maintenance debt.
keyMessages: AI automation should reduce manual work by 30-50%, not add complexity
We bridge the gap between AI hype and operational reality
contentThemes: The Real Cost of Manual Operations: How AI can cut 25% of repetitive tasks
5 Signs Your Current Automation is Holding You Back (Exception handling, data quality, edge cases)
From Pilot to Scale: Why Most AI Projects Fail and How to Prevent It
phases: Phase 1: Awareness — Establish presence through problem-identification content and niche positioning
Phase 2: Consideration — Deep-dive frameworks, methodologies, and transparent ROI tracking
Phase 3: Conversion — Case studies with specific metrics, implementation timelines, and consultation calls
campaigns.currentPhase: Phase 1: Awareness — Establish presence through problem-identification content and niche positioning

campaigns.name: ROI-First Implementation
campaigns.objective: Position Danox as the ROI specialist for AI automation by demonstrating measurable 30-90 day outcomes and generating 10+ high-intent consultation requests monthly.
campaigns.targetAudience: CTOs, COOs, and marketing leaders at scaling businesses facing unclear AI ROI, integration complexity, and maintenance debt.
campaigns.positioning: Measurable, transparent AI automation implementation with proven 30-90 day ROI outcomes and clear risk mitigation.
keyMessages: We don't sell tools; we deliver measurable business outcomes
ROI tracking frameworks that prove 30-50% time savings within 90 days
Governance and security built-in, not bolted on
contentThemes: ROI Tracking Frameworks: How to Prove 30% Efficiency Gains Within 90 Days
Case Studies: Before/After Comparisons with Specific Metrics
Risk Mitigation: How We Handle Exception Cases and Edge Conditions
phases: Phase 1: Awareness — Share ROI philosophy and measurement frameworks
Phase 2: Consideration — Technical deep dives on integration patterns and governance
Phase 3: Conversion — Detailed case studies, implementation timelines, and direct consultation calls
campaigns.currentPhase: Phase 1: Awareness — Share ROI philosophy and measurement frameworks

campaigns.name: Niche Specialization
campaigns.objective: Build authority in specific workflow automation categories by demonstrating deep expertise and generating consistent inbound from aligned prospects.
campaigns.targetAudience: Founders and operators specifically struggling with [specific workflow type: e.g., customer onboarding, data integration, reporting automation].
campaigns.positioning: Specialized expertise in [workflow type] automation, not generic 'we do AI' claims.
keyMessages: Depth over breadth: We specialize in [specific workflow type]
Transparent implementation methodology for complex workflows
Proven ROI frameworks specific to [workflow type]
contentThemes: The Real Cost of Manual [Specific Workflow] Operations
5 Signs Your [Workflow Type] Automation is Holding You Back
Exception Handling and Edge Case Management for [Specific Workflow]
phases: Phase 1: Awareness — Problem-identification content focused on specific workflow pain points
Phase 2: Consideration — Technical frameworks and methodology for [workflow type]
Phase 3: Conversion — Niche-specific case studies and consultation calls
campaigns.currentPhase: Phase 1: Awareness — Problem-identification content focused on specific workflow pain points
successMetrics: Consultation requests from aligned prospects (target: 8+ monthly)

infrastructure.funnelStrategy: Top-funnel LinkedIn content drives profile visits → 2-field lead magnet (checklist/template) → email nurture sequence → consultation request. Mid-funnel: carousel/PDF deep dives on specific workflows. Bottom-funnel: case studies with specific metrics and direct consultation calls.
conversionPaths: Primary: LinkedIn post → profile visit → 2-field lead magnet download → email nurture → consultation request
Secondary: LinkedIn post → carousel/PDF download → email nurture → consultation request
infrastructure.nurtureApproach: Email sequences focused on problem identification (Weeks 1-2), framework education (Weeks 3-4), and case study proof (Weeks 5-6). Each email provides actionable insight, not just promotion. Include 1-2 field lead capture per sequence stage.

leadQualification.qualificationThreshold: 40+ points (FIT + INTENT + TIMING) triggers MQL status; 60+ points triggers SQL status for immediate sales attention.
leadQualification.routingGuidance: Hot leads (<1 hour response window) get immediate sales outreach. Warm leads (24-48 hour window) enter automated nurture sequence with weekly check-ins.

salesHandoff.process: CRM notification with lead score, asset history, and engagement timeline → scheduled discovery call within 1 hour for MQLs → qualification framework (company size, budget, timeline, decision committee) → proposal within 48 hours
requiredContext: Asset download history and engagement timeline
Current tool stack and integration complexity

measurementPlan: Weekly: LinkedIn impressions, profile visits, post engagement rate
Monthly: Consultation requests, lead-to-consultation conversion, cost per lead
Quarterly: Consultation-to-client conversion, CAC payback period, LTV:CAC ratio
Ongoing: Lead response time, form friction impact, nurture sequence effectiveness
